name: The Crystal Ballroom & Lounge
description:
Congratulations on your engagement and thank you for your interest in hosting such a memorable occasion with us at Crystal Ballroom & Lounge! As a family owned venue, we focus on personalized and flexible service and unwavering quality. From our gourmet food made from scratch to the dedicated event manager who will stay with you from your first tour through the evening of your wedding day, no detail is overlooked. Also, we only host one event per day, so you can be assured that you'll receive the attention you deserve on your big day.

The Crystal Ballroom & Lounge is located in Downtown Evanston, just steps away from amazing lake front photo opportunities, lush rose gardens, four hotels, ample parking, and multiple restaurants and bars. With all the conveniences of suburban living and all the style of downtown Chicago, our location can’t be beat! 

Choosing a venue for your wedding is a big decision, and we are here to assist you in any way we can. Contact us today to start planning your dream wedding day!

Weddings & Banquets


Congratulations and Best Wishes!!!
Celebrate your special occasion with us. Our scenic course and elegant clubhouse can provide the perfect backdrop to your wedding, anniversary celebration, or any other function you may have. We opened our beautiful 17,000 sqare foot clubhouse in 2007. Our spacious 9,500 square foot banquet hall features custom floor plans, a movable stage, and a movable dance floor. The banquet hall comfortably seats 400 guests at round tables, but can seat 500 people if needed. Our outdoor patio overlooking the lush greens is a wonderful place to have wedding ceremony with comfortable seating up to 300. Our event menus are delectable and our service is excellent, keeping our guests happy and your planning stress-free.

name: Champaign Country Club
description:
The Champaign Country Club is a private, family oriented Club with rich history dating back 1904.
	The nearly 100-acre property is nestled in the heart of Champaign and features an 18-hole golf course, Har-Tru clay tennis courts, Olympic-sized swimming pool, and the 36,500 square foot clubhouse. Though exceptional golf has always been at the core of the Club, the accompanied amenities, lifestyle activities, and vibrant social scene create an unmatched, inclusive getaway for members. Whether you are a young professional with a growing family, retiree, or anywhere in between, you can make a lifetime of memories and generations of friends at the Champaign Country Club.

                    Panther Creek Country Club
                    Panther Creek Country Club is Springfield’s foremost Championship Private Country Club. Conveniently located on Springfield’s growing Southwest side. Panther Creek sits just minutes away from the Capital. With our Hale Irwin designed championship golf course, casual yet elegant clubhouse facilities, comprehensive social and athletic programs for men, women and children, Panther Creek has emerged as Springfield’s leading family club. 

Panther Creek has been home to professional golf in central Illinois serving as the home of the LPGA’s State Farm Classic from 2007-2011 and currently host of the Memorial Health Championship presented by LRS, a PGA TOUR sanctioned Korn Ferry event since 2016.

                    Who We Are
                    Established in 1908, The Beverly Country Club is a mainstay in the Chicagoland golf community.

From its inception, Beverly was recognized as a championship course, a distinction that still resonates over one century later.

Beverly’s mark on American golf was firmly made when club officials decided to ask legendary architect Donald Ross to create a master plan to renovate the course and bring it back up to major championship standards. Over the course of nearly a decade, the entire Ross plan was adopted, again putting Beverly among the very finest golf courses in the country. Over the years, Beverly has been the host of four Western Open championships (1910, 1963, 1967 and 1970) and one U.S. Amateur championship (1931). Beverly also hosted the 1943 Chicago Victory National Open Championship, a wartime substitute for the National Open. Championship golf returned to Beverly in 1999 when the rejuvenated Chicago Open came to the South Side for a three-year run, with PGA Tour star Luke Donald winning in 2000. More recently, Beverly has hosted the 2009 U.S. Senior Amateur, 2011 Western Junior and the 2014 Western Amateur tournaments.

If one can correlate the strength of a course’s champions to the strength of the course, Beverly is a true test of golf. Its champions include legends like Arnold Palmer, Jack Nicklaus, Francis Ouimet and Chick Evans.

                    Panther Creek Country Club
                    Panther Creek Country Club is Springfield’s foremost Championship Private Country Club. Conveniently located on Springfield’s growing Southwest side. Panther Creek sits just minutes away from the Capital. With our Hale Irwin designed championship golf course, casual yet elegant clubhouse facilities, comprehensive social and athletic programs for men, women and children, Panther Creek has emerged as Springfield’s leading family club. 

Panther Creek has been home to professional golf in central Illinois serving as the home of the LPGA’s State Farm Classic from 2007-2011 and currently host of the Memorial Health Championship presented by LRS, a PGA TOUR sanctioned Korn Ferry event since 2016.
